results.title: Kore.ai Documentation
results.html:
• Products
    • AI for Work
    • AI for Process
    • AI for Service (XO)
    • Agent Platform
  • Solutions
    • AI for Retail
    • AI for HR
    • AI for IT
    • AI for Recruit
    • AI for Healthcare
    • AI for Banking
  • Community
  • Support
  • Academy

Welcome to Kore.ai Product Documentation

Learn how to build and deploy AI agents at enterprise scale - quickly, securely, and flexibly with Kore.ai Agent Platform and solution offerings for Work, Process, and Service.

AI for Work

Enhance employee productivity through intelligent information discovery, knowledge access, task automation, and cross-organizational collaboration

AI for Process

Automate knowledge-intensive tasks, improve compliance, and ensure consistency by transforming complex workflows into agent-driven processes.

AI for Service (XO Platform)

Automate customer interactions across channels with agentic solutions for contact centers and self-service, enabling fast resolution and improved satisfaction.

The foundation for all AI solutions, providing enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestration with end-to-end capabilities, no-code tools, SDKs, and robust security.

AI Agents

Build intelligent Al systems that autonomously collaborate to handle complex tasks.

Tools

Framework with connectors and APIs enabling Al agents to interact with enterprise systems.

Search and Data AI

Retrieval system with connectors for Al agents to access and enrich organizational knowledge.

Model Hub

System to fine-tune and host Al models with enterprise data, supporting various model types.

Prompt Studio

Collaborative environment to create and test prompts, with versioning for optimal LLM performance.

Evaluation Studio

Measure LLM & Agentic app performance using customizable metrics and AI-human evaluators.

AI Safety

Framework providing governance and controls to protect sensitive data and regulate Al outputs.

Observability

Comprehensive logging and monitoring system offering visibility into Al operations and decisions.

Employee Solutions

AI for HR

AI-driven employee engagement solution for personalized support throughout the entire employee lifecycle.

AI for Recruit

A Gen AI-powered solution that solves hiring challenges and enhances recruitment efficiency and effectiveness.

AI for IT

Generative AI-powered self-service and Help Desk solution for efficient employee IT support.

Customer Solutions

AI for Healthcare

Virtual healthcare assistant to deliver conversational support for patients, providers, members, and employees.

AI for Retail

Virtual retail assistant for order management and customer service across digital, voice, and in-store platforms.

AI for Banking

Employ your virtual banking assistant powered by a domain-specific LLM in just 30 days for chat, voice, and web.

© 2026 Kore.ai, Inc.

  • Acceptable Use Policy
  • Terms of Service
  • Privacy Policy
  • Cookie Policy

 Products

 AI for Process

		 Agent Platform

 Welcome to Kore.ai Product Documentation
 Learn how to build and deploy AI agents at enterprise scale - quickly, securely, and flexibly with Kore.ai Agent Platform and solution offerings for Work, Process, and Service.
 
 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 AI for Work
 
 
 Enhance employee productivity through intelligent information discovery, knowledge access, task automation, and cross-organizational collaboration
 
 
 
 
 
 
 AI for Process
 
 
 Automate knowledge-intensive tasks, improve compliance, and ensure consistency by transforming complex workflows into agent-driven processes.
 
 
 
 
 
					AI for Service (XO Platform)
 
 
 Automate customer interactions across channels with agentic solutions for contact centers and self-service, enabling fast resolution and improved satisfaction.
 
 

 
 
 

	 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The foundation for all AI solutions, providing enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestration with end-to-end capabilities, no-code tools, SDKs, and robust security.
 
 
 
 
 
 AI Agents
 
 
 Build intelligent Al systems that autonomously collaborate to handle complex tasks.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tools
 
 
 Framework with connectors and APIs enabling Al agents to interact with enterprise systems.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Search and Data AI
 
 
 Retrieval system with connectors for Al agents to access and enrich organizational knowledge.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Model Hub
 
 
 System to fine-tune and host Al models with enterprise data, supporting various model types.
 
 
			 
			 
 
 
 
 Prompt Studio 
 
 
 Collaborative environment to create and test prompts, with versioning for optimal LLM performance.
 
 
			 
			 
 
 
 
 Evaluation Studio 
 
 
 Measure LLM & Agentic app performance using customizable metrics and AI-human evaluators.
 
 
			 
			 
			 
 
 
 
 AI Safety
 
 
 Framework providing governance and controls to protect sensitive data and regulate Al outputs.
 
 
			 
			 
			 
 
 
 
 Observability
 
 
 Comprehensive logging and monitoring system offering visibility into Al operations and decisions.
 
 
 
 
 
	 
 
 
 
 
	
 
 Employee Solutions
 
 
	
 
 
 
 
 
 AI for HR
 
 
 AI-driven employee engagement solution for personalized support throughout the entire employee lifecycle.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 AI for Recruit
 
 
 A Gen AI-powered solution that solves hiring challenges and enhances recruitment efficiency and effectiveness.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 AI for IT
 
 
 Generative AI-powered self-service and Help Desk solution for efficient employee IT support.
 
 
 
	
 
 
 
 
 
 Customer Solutions
 
 
 
 
	 
 
 
 
 AI for Healthcare
 
 
 Virtual healthcare assistant to deliver conversational support for patients, providers, members, and employees.
 
 
	 
 
 
 
 
 AI for Retail
 
 
 Virtual retail assistant for order management and customer service across digital, voice, and in-store platforms.
 
 
		
		 
 
 
 
 AI for Banking
 
 
 Employ your virtual banking assistant powered by a domain-specific LLM in just 30 days for chat, voice, and web.
 
 
		
 
 


 
 
 
 
 © 2026 Kore.ai, Inc.
 
 
 
 
 Acceptable Use Policy 
 Terms of Service 
 Privacy Policy 
 Cookie Policy
